scripts.dev: concurrently --names "DB,API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run db" "npm run api" "npm run web"
scripts.api: npm --prefix backend install --silent && node scripts/wait-db.js && npm --prefix backend run db:migrate && npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix app install
